Uncle Joe and the Addition of Fractions that dont look like each other
Mission: Landed
Reactor: 0/5
Move Uncle Joe: WASD, keyboard arrows, or the left on-screen pad. Look around with mouse drag or the right-side buttons. Walk to the chamber. The door opens upwards when you approach. Uncle Joe now has stronger collision: rocket, computer, chamber walls, and closed doors are solid.

Reactor reward collected!
Uncle Joe is returning to his rocket.
E Interact
🚀 Space Chamber Mission

Uncle Joe and the Addition of Fractions that dont look like each other

Practise addition of unlike fractions in a space chamber mission.

Uncle Joe lands on a mysterious planet and heads towards a glowing space chamber.

Complete the challenge to collect the reactor reward and fly to the next destination.

How to play

Move: Use WASD / arrow keys on laptop, or the on-screen arrow pads on mobile.

Mission rule: Learn Mode and Practice Mode are for preparation. Finish 10 Challenge Mode questions correctly in one sitting to collect the reactor reward.

🧑‍🚀Walk Uncle Joe
🚪Open chamber
🧮Solve fractions
⚛️Escape planet

Mission Complete!
